lore.english:
A human-modification cyborg weapon developed through the inhumane processes of State Task Force "G", using covertly acquired Demon Realm technology and UFS's cutting-edge science.

Built using a living human as its base, most of its body has been replaced with high-performance mechanical components. It operates with the aim of executing missions beyond human limits, leveraging a cyborg's immunity to pain and steel-like durability.

Typically dressed in a suit with black sunglasses, it is specialized for infiltrating agent protected or heavily guarded urban areas or official events to eliminate targets.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Dual Machine Gun[-]
skills.description:
Fires the hidden gun at the enemy [A:18201] times.
[&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] increases in proportion to DEF.
Increases [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1820102]%)[-].
skills.description_readable:
Fires the hidden gun at the enemy 7 times.
DMG increases in proportion to DEF.
Increases CRIT Rate by (5%).

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Heat Ray[-]
skills.description:
Fires laser beam from the eyes to attack the enemy [A:18202] times.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1820202]%)[-] [&Burn] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1820202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1820202] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Fires laser beam from the eyes to attack the enemy 3 times.
Target hit is inflicted with (3.5%) Burn at a 20% chance.
Duration: 3 turn(s)
